response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack and systems engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) with demonstrated work on high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and a track record of building platforms (GISCollective, test frameworks). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry foundations, or statistical analysis — all central to this Principal-level Growth/Experimentation role. Title history tops out at Senior/Staff rather than Principal/IC6, and there is no evidence of multi-team, cross-org technical leadership at the scale expected. A screening conversation could clarify hidden experimentation work, but as written the fit is partial.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with production systems at scale (Sociomantic millions of req/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, test tooling authorship
Demonstrated initiative building platforms and developer tooling (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts, MCP frameworks)
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or metrics-platform experience on resume
Career level history (Senior/Staff) and team-scope signals are below Principal/IC6 expectations
Limited evidence of data science partnership, statistical analysis, or guardrail/bias-detection work
